g.text: Full Connection Lifecycle: Write Buffer + Timer

div.p: Transitions: trigger → [function call sequence] ● = initial ◼ = terminal Red = mandatory cleanup order

text.tspan: → fd-reuse race: new accept gets same fd
number; old DEL deregisters new conn
ILLEGAL: timer_cancel on wrong idx after heap_swap
[ALL 4 steps mandatory — missing any = resource leak]
